creator: alexanderchuranov@gmail.com
text:
In a private conversation with Tom Evans (who filed the issue) the
build log was examined. It was compared with the successful build log
from the pointyhat. The only noticed difference is that pointyhat does
not use ccache. After disabling the ccache libraries were built
successfully.

The issue is an incompatibility of the maintained port and a
third-party product. I suggest considering the issue resolved.

Alexander Churanov,
maintainer of devel/boost-*
